mapper.insert: insert into dms_herbal_prescription_record (status, create_time, amount, name, therapy, therapy_details, medical_advice, pair_num, registration_id, frequency, usage_means, type, create_staff_id) values (#{status}, #{createTime}, #{amount}, #{name}, #{therapy}, #{therapyDetails}, #{medicalAdvice}, #{pairNum}, #{registrationId}, #{frequency}, #{usageMeans}, #{type}, #{createStaffId})
mapper.select: select * from dms_herbal_prescription_record where registration_id = #{registrationId} and (status is null or status <> 2) order by id desc
select COALESCE(sum(amount), 0) from dms_herbal_prescription_record where registration_id = #{registrationId} and (status is null or status <> 2)
